title: Kristen Bennett Named to Lunar South Pole Science Team
description: NASA selected Kristen Bennett, a core researcher with the Radiant Center for Remote Sensing, as one of 10 participating scientists who will help shape science planning for Artemis lunar surface missions near the Moon's south pole.
imageAlt: Kristen Bennett supports lunar south pole science
impact: Radiant connects NAU researchers to mission planning that shapes how astronauts will collect observations, deploy instruments, and gather samples on the lunar surface. Bennett's selection highlights Radiant's role in preparing science operations for Artemis and future exploration of the Moon and Mars.
